jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ module system compatibility.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer JDKs and do not configure the module path or annotation processor path correctly, which is required for Java 17 compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize Java 17 features/syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations or compile on Java 17 due to internal API changes.
